title: TUI parity: get crates/tui IonApp to functional parity with rnk version
description: IonApp compiles and renders but is functionally broken. Cursor invisible, no working keybindings in practice, pickers don't render, completers missing, tool output not expanding, many state sync gaps. Need systematic gap analysis and implementation.

logs.msg: Fixed two bugs in crates/tui inline rendering: (1) insert_before blank space gap — added content_cursor two-phase approach (direct write then ScrollUp), (2) focus event leak ^[[O — moved EnableFocusChange after EventStream creation. Committed as 93f2ac3. Review passed LGTM. Needs manual testing.
